actual_title: Runtime Systems, Environments, and Computational Context

cards.title: Runtime Manifest
cards.governance_note: Record runtime, OS, hardware, dependencies, configuration, permissions, and external services.

cards.title: Dependency Control
cards.governance_note: Pin and review dependencies, models, datasets, and toolchains.

cards.title: Observability
cards.governance_note: Preserve logs, metrics, traces, audit records, output hashes, and errors.
